description: Draws a curved annotation passing through at least three anchor points. Creates a smooth curve connecting the specified points with optional styling.
utility: Highlight or annotate curved paths in diagrams with multiple anchor points

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point3
arguments.description: Third anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: additionalPoints
arguments.description: Additional anchor points for the curve

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

alternates.syntax: annotationcurve(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), at(r3, c3))
annotationcurve(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), at(r3, c3), at(r4, c4), c(red))
alternates.description: Curve through four or more points with color
